title: Bio Portfolio App
description: A fully customized Next.js 15 application utilizing App Router and purely static exports. It serves as a digital garden to share multiple domains of my works.

title: AI Image Gen CLI
description: A Python CLI tool powered by deep learning models capable of synthesizing highly-detailed images directly from textual prompts. Completely offline.

title: Design System UI
description: Internal library of React components tailored for high-end fashion e-commerce using accessible unstyled primitives and framer-motion.

title: Arbitrage Bot (Rust)
description: High-frequency arbitrage bot written in Rust. Listens to multiple WebSocket streams across exchanges and executes trades within milliseconds.

title: 3D Garment Configurator
description: A WebGL-based garment configurator. Users can mix and match materials and view the garment rendering perfectly stitched in a generic environment.
